action.reasoning: Observation: Iterator 13's training failed with StopIteration due to visual encoder dtype issue, likely caused by using device_map='cuda:0' with PeftModel. The debug on val samples shows model generates correct box tokens but coordinates are inaccurate (IoU ~0.04), meaning the model didn't learn accurate grounding from only 500 samples. Analysis: We need more training data (all 7100 samples), longer training (3 epochs), and higher LoRA rank to improve spatial accuracy. The StopIteration bug can be avoided by loading base model without device_map, moving to GPU manually, then applying LoRA. Decision: Write a robust train.py with manual training loop, full data, LoRA rank 16, accumulate 8, log IoU on val subset, merge model, and submit eval.
